notes: Generated from Pikalytics Champions Tournaments usage list (usage > 2%) and Champions AI move usage. Speed cards use max Speed + max attacking stat with best speed nature. Damage cards use Champions 32-point EV model and are converted to Gen9 EVs for @smogon/calc calculations.
